reasoning: Historically, Rockstar Games often delays major titles (GTA IV, GTA V, RDR2) by 5-8 months from their initially announced windows. The original window for GTA VI was simply '2025', which Take-Two narrowed to 'Fall 2025' in early to mid-2024. Placing the release late in the year leaves very little room for further delays without slipping into 2026. If the game is delayed, it will likely be pushed to Spring 2026. However, Take-Two has heavily aligned its FY2026 financial expectations with a Fall 2025 release, showing strong commitment. The probability of an on-time release in 2025 is estimated around 65-70%. If the game releases in 2025, a simultaneous global release including Europe is almost certain. Therefore, the overall probability is set at 68%.
batch_queries: ¿Se venderá el videojuego "Grand Theft Auto VI" en Europa en 2025?
